note: Curated property overrides and notes. Remaining Z≤92 null hardness/conductivity fields are N/A in PeriodicTable.com / Wolfram ElementData — not silently invented.

atomicMassOverrides.note: PubChem periodic-table CSV rounds some masses to integers. App uses IUPAC conventional atomic weights.

brinellHardnessOverrides.note: Deep audit 2026-07-20 phase 1. Au was 10x high (2450), Ag 10x low (24.5) — both corrected to ~245 MPa (annealed/upper-bound convention). Ge had a Vickers-scale artifact (~7.3 GPa) mislabeled as Brinell; set null like Si/B. Sweep of all non-null Brinell values found no other x10/÷10 or high-precision fabrications.

superheavyImages.note: Sg–Lv use Wikimedia Commons element SVG placeholders (same pattern as Rf/Db) when no specimen photo exists.
